original_prompt: Fix JSON editor misalignment by hardening CSS in main.css and updating sync logic in view.triggers.js. Ensure absolute typographical sync and scroll binding.
rephrased_goal: Resolve text shifting in the JSON editor by synchronizing box models, enforcing non-wrapping white-space, and binding scroll positions between the interactive and highlight layers.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Harden JSON editor CSS in main.css
subtasks_required: 1.1 Replace Section 14 (JSON Editor) in main.css with strict alignment CSS
1.2 Enforce white-space: pre and identical padding/borders
tasks.analogy_reference: making nested caves exactly same size
tasks.testing_criteria: CSS contains white-space: pre !important and box-sizing: border-box for both layers.

subtasks_required: 2.1 Inspect main.css for padding and border parity
tasks.testing_criteria: Padding and border values match exactly between .json-textarea and .json-highlighted.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Update syncJSONHighlight logic in view.triggers.js
subtasks_required: 3.1 Update function to use codeBlock.textContent and sync scrollTop/scrollLeft
tasks.testing_criteria: Function captures parentElement and binds scroll event.

subtasks_required: Verify SQL editor still works (regression check)
tasks.testing_criteria: Build success, alignment shift resolved in UI.
